message:
fix(reports): use euclidean division for negative timestamps and char-based truncation (wa-1rxl0.1)

- format_ts: replace `/` and `%` with `div_euclid`/`rem_euclid` so negative
  epoch-ms timestamps produce valid UTC strings instead of negative components
- truncate: switch from byte-based `s.len()` and `&s[..max]` to char-based
  `s.chars().count()` and `s.chars().take(max)` preventing panics on multibyte
  Unicode boundaries
- Add unit tests for negative timestamp formatting (-1ms, -1s, -1001ms)
- Minor proptest cleanup: remove unused arb_duration_ms, extend
  days_ymd_format_ts_consistent range to cover pre-epoch days

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
